justification: The diff successfully migrates from Java EE (javax.*) to Jakarta EE (jakarta.*) and updates dependencies to modern versions (Hibernate 6, PrimeFaces 14, Jakarta Servlet 6). However, it only targets Java 17 (maven.compiler.source/target and release set to 17) instead of Java 21, missing the opportunity to use Java 21 idioms like pattern matching for switch or records. The addition of @Serial annotations is a good modernization step for Java 14+, but the overall migration stops short of Java 21.
